---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the public playbook, templates, docs, or workflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the improvement in one or two sentences.

## Problem / gap

What is missing, unclear, repetitive, or hard to use today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Scope

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Skills
- [ ] Scripts
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] CI / project workflow

## Public-safe check

- [ ] This request can be addressed without exposing private vault data
- [ ] This request does not depend on private infrastructure

## Additional context

Add examples, links, or references if useful.
